The '''Mining Guild Sector Headquarters''' on [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]] was the headquarters of the [[Mining Guild/Legends|Mining Guild]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. It was comprised of a large building constructed from high-grade polished [[Marble/Legends|marble]] and was located in the Commercial District of [[Estalle Island]].

Mining Guild lobbyists and negotiators had offices at the Headquarters. Their objectives were to represent the interests of member companies before the [[Great Council (Tapani Federation)|Great Council]].
